title: 乙名史記者の徹底取材

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way back to the waiting room after the
race, a reporter corners me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Thank you for taking the time to speak with me. I'm Etsuko Otonashi from Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I had the pleasure of watching the race firsthand,
and I'd just like to commend you on all your hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame she didn't get first place, but your
trainee really put her unique personality on full
display with her performance.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, how do you intend to steer your ship
back on course?
choice_data_list:
We are carefully considering our current
situation.
We're just gonna keep pushing forward!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: How interesting...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
More flexible regimen, confer with the director
about anything the academy lacks... All for the
sake of the Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Taking your results in stride while looking ahead
to your next race—just what I'd expect from a
Tracen trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looks like I handled that pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I then tell <chrname> about the
successful interview and praise her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Considering these results, I expected
to hear somewhat more concrete plans...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your statement. I hope you find
more success in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I wasn't able to make a good
impression on the reporter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide not to mention the interview when I go to
praise <chrname> for her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
S-simply amazing! I should have expected no less
from a Tracen Academy trainer!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You're saying you simply need to draw out her
innate abilities, right?! Of course! All she needs is
a little strategy and experience!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And now you plan to forgo sleep and devise
countless clever stratagems?! Naturally! Anything
to help your trainee claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The deep trust you have for one another—it's
simply overwhelming!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The next feature article is decided! I have to talk
to the editor-in-chief right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels like my statement was taken way out of
proportion, but I guess I handled the interview
well enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I then go and tell <chrname> about
the interview and praise her hard work.
